$$

$$
x = \frac{4170 + 390}{470} = \frac{4560}{470} \approx 9.7
$$

$$

The exact radian measure for $325^\circ$ is calculated by converting degrees to radians using the formula:

$$
\text{radians} = \text{degrees} \times \frac{\pi}{180}
$$

So,

$$
325^\circ = 325 \times \frac{\pi}{180} = \frac{325}{180}\pi
$$

Simplifying the fraction:

$$
\frac{325}{180} = \frac{65}{36}
$$

Thus, the exact radian measure is:

$$
\boxed{65/36\ \text{pi}}
$$
